title: Saro´s Default Options
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_Header.webp)


![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_Description.webp)

Saros Default Options is a Minecraft Forge mod that allows server administrators and modpack creators to establish and maintain default configurations for their setups. With this mod, you can define a set of configuration files in a designated directory, which will be copied into the main directory when the game launches. This provides a straightforward way to enforce server or modpack-specific settings for all players.


![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_Features.webp)

- **Customizable Default Configuration**: Easily create default configuration files that will be applied each time the mod is loaded.
- **Optional Overwrite Functionality**: Configure the mod to either overwrite existing configuration files or leave them intact.
- **Automatic Folder Setup**: The mod will automatically generate the necessary directory structure upon the first launch if it doesn’t already exist.


![Installation](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_Installation.webp)


1. Download the mod and place it in the `mods` folder of your Minecraft Forge or Fabric setup.
2. Launch Minecraft to generate the initial configuration files and folders.
3. Place your default configuration files in the "Saros Default Options" folder that appears next to your main configuration directory.
4. Adjust the mod’s configuration file (`sarosdefaultoptions.cfg`) to enable or disable overwriting, depending on your needs.

### Configuration

The mod includes a configuration file named `sarosdefaultoptions.cfg`, where you can control whether the mod will overwrite existing configuration files.

- **overwriteConfigFiles** (default: `false`): If set to `true`, the mod will overwrite any existing configuration files with the default files each time it is loaded. If set to `false`, it will only copy files if they do not already exist.

![Supported Versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_SupportedVersions.webp)

- 1.21.5 Forge✅
- 1.21.3 Forge✅
- 1.21.1 Forge✅
- 1.21 Forge✅
- 1.20.6 Forge✅
- 1.20.4 Forge✅
- 1.20.1 Forge✅
- 1.19.4 Forge✅
- 1.19.2 Forge✅
- 1.18.2 Forge✅
- 1.16.5 Forge✅
- 1.12.2 Forge✅
  - Fabric versions only available on request

### Using in Modpacks

You are welcome to include Saros Default Options in modpacks, provided that you give credit to the mod creator. This mod is designed to make modpack management easier by ensuring consistent configuration across all instances.

![JoinOurCommunity](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_Community.webp)
Connect with us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) and be part of the Saro's Mod community!


[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Default_Options/MP_Saros_Default_Options_PromoCard.webp)](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
